title: QFINHUB Quality Auditor — Rules & Scoring
name: QFINHUB Quality Auditor
mission: REVIEW every proposed action. APPROVE/REJECT/NEEDS_REVISION/HOLD_FOR_DATA before any execution.

search_intent_match.description: Does the page target a real search query with clear intent?

uniqueness.description: Is this page unique? Not duplicating existing content?

usefulness_depth.description: Is it genuinely useful? 2,000+ words? Specific examples?

calculator_integration.description: Does it connect to a QFINHUB calculator? Show results?

internal_links.description: Are internal links natural and useful?

eeat_safety.description: No unsupported financial claims? Educational disclaimer?

query_match.description: Does the proposed title/meta match the target query?

clickability.description: Will this make users click? Benefit-driven? Question hooks?

accuracy.description: Is it accurate? No clickbait? No false claims?

serp_readability.description: Fits within SERP display limits? Clear and scannable?

gates: In sitemap if intended — must pass
Not requested in last 7 days — must pass
indexing_request.rule: ALL gates must pass. Any single FAIL = REJECT

personalization.description: Does it mention their site/content specifically?

relevance.description: Is QFINHUB widget/calculator relevant to their audience?

value_proposition.description: Clear benefit for them to add the widget?

compliance.description: No spam language? No paid link requests? No anchor demands?

visual_attractiveness.description: Does it look premium? Fintech quality?

readability.description: Is text readable at Pinterest sizes? No garbled text?

cta_clarity.description: Clear what user should do? Click? Save?

destination_match.description: Does the link match the pin topic?

risk_levels.HIGH: Requires strong justification. May need Qasem review.
risk_levels.CRITICAL: BLOCK. Do not proceed under any circumstances.
